Aurelia 60-second demo draft transcript

0-5s:
Aurelia is a local-first supervised automation agent.

5-12s:
The user enters: AURELIA busca codigos numericos.

12-25s:
Aurelia observes the active demo conversation and moves the visible cursor toward the active area.

25-40s:
Aurelia highlights dummy numeric references and one dummy address in sequence:
458 Harbor Ave, 3:20 PM, 742918, 12, 3056.

40-52s:
The visible timeline animates Before, Action, and After with the exact stop state outcome_unknown.

52-60s:
Aurelia stops before any external action. If the outcome cannot be verified, Aurelia reports outcome_unknown and blocks automatic retries.

Safety note:
This demo uses fictitious data only. It does not show private chats, emails, payment data, credentials, 2FA, medical information, or real user records.
